case_title: CUMIS INSURANCE SOCIETY vs. BOSC, LAWRENCE

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUMIS INSURANCE SOCIETY AS TO DEFENDANT BOSC, LAWRENCE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-27-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-07-1993
